user.title: Add a tariff plan
user.description: Set up cost tracking for one electricity plan. Billing cycle and time-of-use periods are configured next, in the plan's options.

data.import_energy_sensor: Grid import energy sensor (kWh, total increasing)
data.import_power_sensor: Grid import power sensor (W, optional - live bonus feedback)
data.export_energy_sensor: Grid export energy sensor (kWh, total increasing, optional - solar feed-in)

data.billing_cycle_days: Cycle length (days, if not calendar month)
data.billing_cycle_start: Cycle anchor start date (if not calendar month)

data.name: Period name
data.tier1_limit_kwh: First-tier limit (kWh/day, blank = flat rate for whole period)
data.tier2_rate: Rate after first-tier limit is used
data.bonus_enabled: Enable no-usage bonus for this period

error.start_date_required: A start date is required for a custom-length billing cycle
error.start_end_equal: Start and end time cannot be the same

options.every_n_days: Fixed N-day cycle from a start date

options.energy_delta: From energy usage during window (no extra sensor needed)
options.live_power_sensor: From live power sensor readings during window
